issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://www.webull.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.webull.com%2F) ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/2heg5zrwlticss4s8o8gog8ogg0c8sob27ib5yaiao.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for Android v4.14 Nightly 38 System version: | `Android 16` Browser: | firefox mobile License type: | paid AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | yes Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter,
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Annoyances filter

**Security:**
Phishing URL Blocklist,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks,
Online Malicious URL Blocklist

**Language-specific:**
AdGuard Turkish filter,
AdGuard Russian filter Custom filters: | `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/uBlockOrigin/uAssets/refs/heads/master/filters/ubo-link-shorteners.txt`,
`https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js`,
`https://gitflic.ru/project/magnolia1234/bypass-paywalls-clean-filters/blob/raw?file=bpc-paywall-filter.txt` Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Send Do-Not-Track header

**Tracking Methods**:
Self-destructing third-party cookies (180h)

**Browser API**:
Block WebRTC,
Block Push API

**Miscellaneous**:
Remove X-Client-Data header from HTTP requests DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | `https://userscripts.adtidy.org/release/adguard-extra/1.0/adguard-extra.meta.js` Userstyles: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.14+Nightly+38&system_version=Android+16&browser=firefox+mobile&filters=11.255.2.3.13.14.257.17.118.208.4.1&custom_filters=https%253A%252F%252Fraw.githubusercontent.com%252FuBlockOrigin%252FuAssets%252Frefs%252Fheads%252Fmaster%252Ffilters%252Fubo-link-shorteners.txt%252Chttps%253A%252F%252Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%252Fnpm%252F%2540filteringdev%252Ftinyshield%2540latest%252Fdist%252FtinyShield.user.js%252Chttps%253A%252F%252Fgitflic.ru%252Fproject%252Fmagnolia1234%252Fbypass-paywalls-clean-filters%252Fblob%252Fraw%253Ffile%253Dbpc-paywall-filter.txt&userscripts=https%253A%252F%252Fuserscripts.adtidy.org%252Frelease%252Fadguard-extra%252F1.0%252Fadguard-extra.meta.js&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=true&dns.enabled=false&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.webrtc=true&stealth.push=true&stealth.location=false&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.hide_search_queries=false&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=false&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.first_party_cookies=4320&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=false&stealth.block_third_party_auth=false&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid)
